chart_map.question: Is synchronized-minus-shuffled lift consistent across held-out locations?
chart_map.takeaway: Shows fold heterogeneity around a zero reference without treating a smoke sign as a finding.
chart_map.palette_policy: single diverging root around zero with labels and a neutral reference line

visual_omissions: Family intervals are an exact audit table because there are too few family aggregates for an additional honest chart.
metric_definitions: 95% CI uses hierarchical resampling over split units and paired seeds
source_filters: primary test uses RGB and transcript only
synchronized and shuffled arms are paired within seed and split
